args: import { resolve } from 'node:path'; import { pathToFileURL } from 'node:url'; const root = process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT; if (!root) throw new Error('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is required'); process.env.OH_MY_HARNESS_RUNTIME = 'claude-code'; await import(pathToFileURL(resolve(root, 'mcp/cli-tools-server.mjs')).href);
